vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1732455789,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7609008825370151998","book_info":{"abstract":"【原神、崩铁、火影、海贼、jiojio、奥特、战锤、漫威、达尔文事变、人联……】
什么都会写的，写这些主要是为了蹭热度。我主打一个不要脸_(:з」∠)_。
顺便一提本书为自娱自乐。如果你书荒的话，想看点爽文什么的，可以看一看，当然记得留下“一星好评”。
小说的主要内容很简单。
一个神明联通万界，带着万界看一些热点什么的会来一些答题。
乐呵乐呵。
目前呢我打算写一些，什么斩杀线啊？嗯，以及最近那个很火的查理。然后对一些事件进行一些吐槽啊什么的。
云肯定是会云的，毕竟我不可了解所有世界。
而且我也说了，这本书写来只是为了自娱自乐。
顺便圈一点。
嗯我很诚实。
好了就这些，本书有毒点就是云，然后尽量不ooc就这样了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e09f16998789053cc16ba5a7575f15cb","author":"旡奖","author_id":"","book_id":"7609008825370151998","book_name":"天幕：给万界来点热门震撼！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d8b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7609009654760227390","read_count":"29372","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"155071"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"58","tags":"动漫衍生,衍生,同人,第四天灾,直播,二次元,综漫,诸天万界","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2c6ef19d1abd7c2c3500fed6355b8fa9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363601&x-signature=aFuSAtlbaXt9b4lrsuxJk8tzH6U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1607937273902745","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_c
